description: Generic durable asset record for uploaded blobs. Example use: anchoring uploads during draft editing so blobs persist until final records reference them.

main.description: A durable asset anchor record for an uploaded blob and optional tags.

file.description: Uploaded file blob. This record can be used as a durable anchor so temporary uploads are not garbage-collected before final attachment.

tags.description: Optional machine-readable tags for quick checks and filtering.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of record creation in the ATProto PDS.
